mapper.insert: INSERT INTO route_target(tenant_id, model_route_id, tenant_model_candidate_mapping_id, provider_channel_id, upstream_model_id_snapshot, enabled, priority, weight, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{tenantId}, #{modelRouteId}, #{tenantModelCandidateMappingId}, #{providerChannelId}, #{upstreamModelIdSnapshot}, #{enabled}, #{priority}, #{weight}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, model_route_id, tenant_model_candidate_mapping_id, provider_channel_id, upstream_model_id_snapshot, enabled, priority, weight, remark, deleted_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM route_target WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT t.id, t.tenant_id, t.model_route_id, t.tenant_model_candidate_mapping_id, t.provider_channel_id, c.name AS channel_name, t.upstream_model_id_snapshot, t.enabled, t.priority, t.weight, t.remark, (mp.enabled = TRUE AND mp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cm.enabled = TRUE AND cm.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.enabled = TRUE AND c.deleted_at IS NULL) AS mapping_available, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM route_target t JOIN tenant_model_candidate_mapping mp ON mp.id = t.tenant_model_candidate_mapping_id JOIN provider_channel_model cm ON cm.id = mp.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel c ON c.id = t.provider_channel_id WHERE t.model_route_id = #{modelRouteId} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY t.priority ASC, t.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE route_target SET enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, weight = #{weight}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE route_target SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE route_target SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT mp.id AS mapping_id, mp.tenant_id AS mapping_tenant_id, mp.provider_channel_model_id, cm.provider_channel_id, c.tenant_id AS channel_tenant_id, b.protocol, cm.upstream_model_id, mp.enabled AS mapping_enabled, cm.enabled AS candidate_enabled, c.enabled AS channel_enabled FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping mp JOIN provider_channel_model cm ON cm.id = mp.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel c ON c.id = cm.provider_channel_id JOIN provider_base_url b ON b.id = c.provider_base_url_id WHERE mp.id = #{mappingId} AND mp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cm.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
